_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with stakeholders to establish the enterprise continuity of operations program, strategy, and mission assurance.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business objectives, with defined investment priorities, milestones, accountability assignments, and success metrics.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.563), OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.548).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.554). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise, strategy]. DCWF-only terms [assurance, collaborate, continuity, establish, mission, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, business, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.898, R=0.885). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Collaborate with stakeholders to establish the enterprise continuity of operatio" and "Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business ob" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 ≈ STS 0.554 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [enterprise, strategy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [enterprise, strategy]. DCWF-only: [assurance, collaborate, continuity, establish, mission, operations]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, business, data].
